title: Saving money
instruction: The Schofield family need to cut their spending. Choose the best answer.

questions.question: The family spends £200 on entertainment. They want to cut this by half. How much do they spend now?
Their food bill is £400. They cut it by 25%. How much do they save?
Which word means to spend less money?
The rent goes up by £50 per month. How much more do they pay in one year?
Income is £1,800. Expenses are £2,100. What is the shortfall?
